prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **JL486ZQ5** 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 (171 kW / 232 HP) with a **Garrett GTX3582R** turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 62mm compressor inducer) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm** external wastegate to handle 2.2 bar of boost, supported by a **Pectel SQ6M** standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping (targeting 320 HP / 420 Nm on 98 RON fuel).

Drivetrain: Install a **Quaife ATB LSD (QDF7Z)** for the CS95 Plus' 8-speed Aisin automatic transmission (model **AWF8F45**), paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (2400 lb-ft torque capacity) and a **PRL Motorsports short shifter** (25% reduced throw) for manual-like control.

Suspension: Swap the OEM MacPherson struts for a **Öhlins Road & Track DFV kit (CS95-2023-SPEC)** with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, **Eibach Pro-Kit springs (-30mm drop)**, and **SuperPro polyurethane bushings (CS95-specific part #SP-9500K)** for reduced compliance and sharper turn-in.
estetica: Aero: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (CS95 Plus-specific)** with carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), a **Seibon carbon fiber hood (CS95-2023-HOOD)** with integrated NACA ducts, and a **Vorshlag Motorsports rear diffuser (CS95-REAR-DIFF)** with 3D-printed ABS endplates for optimized airflow.

Wheels: Mount **Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x9.5 +25 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)** and **Project Kics R40 6x139.7** lug nuts for OEM+ fitment.

Exterior: Apply a **3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap** with **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** accents (matte gunmetal on roof, pillars, and mirror caps), paired with **Morimoto XB LED headlights (CS95-PLUS-SPEC)** and **Depo Racing side markers (clear lens, amber LED)** for a JDM-inspired aggressive stance.
